pooled_cases_bootstrap.note: Pooled across 5 seeds: each (seed, negative case) treated as one observation; paired diff P2a_spec - bare_spec. Bootstrap resamples the pooled observation index.

picai_note: PI-CAI per-case detection sidecars are not present in the local experiments tree (eval JSONs contain only aggregate scenario scalars). PI-CAI bootstrap is therefore blocked on per-case sidecars; Prostate158 analysis is reported.
